nodes.name: Layard's warbler
nodes.summary: Layard's warbler (Curruca layardi) or Layard's tit-babbler, is a species of Old World warbler in the family Sylviidae. It is found in Lesotho, Namibia, and South Africa. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry shrubland. References External links Layard's warbler - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
